ask-for-download-model: Would you like to download the model from the website
crashed-recently: Since the app is crashed recently, the GPU is disabled. you can enable it in the settings.
global-hotkey-description: Hold the shortcut to record, release to transcribe.
groq-api-key-description: Get a free API key at console.groq.com
info-manual-download: Internet connection is required to download the AI model
info-max-sentence-len: How many letters will be in a single sentence. Works only when word timestamps are on.
info-max-text-ctx: Max context tokens to use from the past text as prompt for the decoder
info-prompt: Make transcripts better by writing expected words.
info-temperature: Higher values lead to more unique words; lower values stick to common ones. Usually set around 0.4 for a balanced result.
info-threads: Increase CPU for faster decoding; balance speed with resource usage. Recommended: 4
model-small-desc: Lightest and fastest. Recommended for very old or low-end machines.
model-medium-desc: Lighter and faster. Recommended for slower or older machines.
model-large-desc: Best accuracy. Recommended for modern computers with a dedicated GPU.
no-model-selected: Select a model in Settings to get started
